channel.title: Note on Hongjie Wu
channel.description: Recent content in Note on Hongjie Wu

item.title: Labuladong Notes
item.description: Labuladong notes 0 Core frame 2 pointer for array notes When the problem is related to subtree, then we need to write the func at the position of postorder 26. Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array in-place -> do not new a array fast and slow pointer for changes 543. Diameter of Binary Tree the diameter of each binary tree is the max sum of depth of the subtree of each node Binary tree quick sort: preorder traversal, merge sort: postorder traversal
